name: Wiki Write Validation Strengthening
goal: Add three validation guard clauses to wiki_write (directive suffixes, YYYY-MM date patterns, content minimum) and update existing test fixtures to use a VALID_CONTENT constant.

tasks.name: Update Existing Test Fixtures with VALID_CONTENT Constant
tasks.description: Add VALID_CONTENT = 'A' * 60 class constant to TestWikiTools and replace all short content strings (< 50 chars) in tests that successfully create wiki pages. Pure refactor — no behavior change, all tests must pass before and after.

steps.description: Add VALID_CONTENT = 'A' * 60 as a class constant on TestWikiTools, immediately before the first test method.
Replace all content strings shorter than 50 chars in tests that successfully create pages with self.VALID_CONTENT. See plan markdown for exhaustive list of 17 test methods to update.
Run full TestWikiTools suite to verify all tests still pass.
steps.expected: All tests pass — same count as before, zero failures.

steps.description: Stage changes.

tasks.name: Directive Suffix Validation
tasks.description: TDD: add two tests for -d<N> suffix rejection, implement re.search(r'-d\d{1,4}(?:-|$)', page) guard clause in wiki_write after the existing directive prefix check.

steps.description: Add test_wiki_write_rejects_directive_suffix and test_wiki_write_rejects_directive_suffix_short to TestWikiTools after test_wiki_write_rejects_bare_directive_number.
Run new tests to confirm RED.
Add directive suffix guard clause to wiki_write in orchestrator_mcp.py immediately after the existing directive prefix check. Pattern: re.search(r'-d\d{1,4}(?:-|$)', page).
Run new tests to confirm GREEN.
Run full TestWikiTools suite to verify no regressions.
Stage changes.

tasks.name: Expanded Date Validation
tasks.description: TDD: add two tests for YYYY-MM and month+year patterns, widen existing YYYY-MM-DD regex to YYYY-MM, and add separate month-name+year guard clause.

steps.description: Add test_wiki_write_rejects_year_month_pattern and test_wiki_write_rejects_month_year_pattern to TestWikiTools after test_wiki_write_rejects_date_stamped_name.
Run new tests to confirm RED.

In wiki_write, replace the existing date check regex r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}' with r'\d{4}-\d{2}'. Then add a second guard clause for r'(?:jan|feb|mar|apr|may|jun|jul|aug|sep|oct|nov|dec)\d{4}' with re.IGNORECASE.
Run new tests to confirm GREEN.
Run full TestWikiTools suite to verify no regressions.
Stage changes.

tasks.name: Content Minimum Validation
tasks.description: TDD: add four tests for empty/whitespace/short/minimum content, implement len(content.strip()) < 50 guard clause in wiki_write between path traversal check and is_update.

steps.description: Add test_wiki_write_rejects_empty_content, test_wiki_write_rejects_whitespace_content, test_wiki_write_rejects_short_content, and test_wiki_write_accepts_minimum_content to TestWikiTools after test_wiki_write_accepts_concept_names.
Run new tests to confirm RED (first three fail, fourth passes).

In wiki_write in orchestrator_mcp.py, add content minimum guard clause between the path traversal return and is_update = os.path.exists(page_path). Check: if len(content.strip()) < 50: return error string.
Run all four new tests to confirm GREEN.
Run full TestWikiTools suite to verify no regressions. Count should be original + 8 new tests.
Stage changes.
